signals.headline: What was last confirmed (March 2026):**
signals.raw:
What was last confirmed (March 2026):**
South Korea's annual inflation rose to **2.2% in March 2026**, up from 2.0% in February, driven primarily by rising global oil prices.[1][2] The Bank of Korea held its policy rate steady at 2.5% at its April meeting and raised its inflation outlook for the year to 2.2%.[2]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
